__fixture__.name: graph_partial_remote_shard_missing
__fixture__.scenario: A workspace graph view is current for local roots but missing a remote shard that is outside the loaded scope because the provider is unreachable. The record uses Partial, names exactly what is missing, and offers a reconnect action.

badge.accessible_name: Partial graph for the selected workset; missing the remote dependency shard because the provider is unreachable.
badge.summary_label: Graph is exact for loaded local roots but incomplete for the declared workset.

authority_source.owner_label: Workspace graph service over local roots plus provider dependency shard.

freshness_floor.label: Graph view must stay on the current graph snapshot epoch for loaded roots.

basis.basis_label: Graph neighborhood built from current local roots; remote shard unresolved.

completeness.declared_scope_label: API workset including local roots and remote dependency shard.
completeness.covered_scope_label: Loaded local roots for the API workset.

scope_omissions.missing_scope_label: Remote dependency shard for tenant-alpha dependency metadata.
scope_omissions.reason_label: The dependency provider did not answer this graph query, so dependency edges outside loaded local roots are absent.

invalidation.label: Loaded local roots are current; missing provider shard keeps the view partial.

snapshot_delta_parity.label: Parity is verified for loaded local roots only.

refresh_action.label: Reconnect the dependency provider and request a fresh graph snapshot to widen the scope.

scope_truth.scope_label: Current API workset scope with a declared missing remote shard.

export_posture.export_label: Export includes the partial graph basis plus the missing provider-shard disclosure.
export_posture.support_packet_label: Support packet preserves the omitted remote shard and reconnect action.
